title: Funny I guess
description: Adds some blocks which can fool you friends and make you laugh.
body:
## **This mod is funny. Yep**
**This Minecraft mod adds some items and block which can fool your friends and are very interesting. There is a bedrock block and you can ask your friend to break it with a diamond pickaxe and it will work and give the real bedrock item. All of the funny blocks and items have crafting recipes like the breakable bedrock is a bed and any stone.**

### **How nice**

This mod was made by the youtuber Vision - 
[YouTube Link](https://www.youtube.com/@Vision_Minecraft/featured)
